---
title: "🗓️ Week 12 - Photogrammetry"
---

In this week, we will learn what is *structure from motion* and *multiview stereo*. 


## 👨‍🏫 Lecture Slides 


- [What is structure from motion?](https://cloud.sdsc.edu/v1/AUTH_opentopography/www/shortcourses/16UNAVCO/nissen-OpenTopo-ASU-APR-2016-structure-from-motion.pdf)


## **Practical exercises**:

#### [Map Anything](https://map-anything.github.io/)

#### [WebODM](https://docs.webodm.org/)

## 📚 Recommended Reading 

Study [Photogrammetry and structure from motion](https://ecampusontario.pressbooks.pub/remotesensing/chapter/chapter-10-photogrammetry-and-structure-from-motion/).
